_doc: PipelineContext -- accumulated state at Stage 03 convergence. Stages 01 (NeedSet) and 02 (Brand Resolver) run in parallel via Promise.all. This object represents everything available to Stage 03 and all subsequent stages. NOTE: The authoritative runtime schema is now pipelineContextSchema.js (Zod, cumulative checkpoints). This JSON is a reference snapshot.
validated_against: 2026-03-23 (re-audited: discoveryResult fields corrected to match live code)

orchestrator_context._doc: Resolved by the orchestrator before and between stages. Not owned by any single stage.
orchestrator_context.discoveryConfig: object -- config with discoveryEnabled=true and searchEngines defaulted to 'bing,google'

planningHints.missingRequiredFields: string[] -- normalized from roundContext or requiredFields
planningHints.missingCriticalFields: string[] -- normalized from roundContext or categoryConfig.schema.critical_fields

orchestrator_context.queryExecutionHistory: { queries: Array<object> } -- from frontierDb.buildQueryExecutionHistory(productId), built before stages start

resolvedIdentity._doc: Built from resolveJobIdentity(job) after stages 01+02 complete.

orchestrator_context.missingFields: string[] -- deduplicated union of missingRequiredFields + missingCriticalFields + job.requirements.focus_fields + llmTargetFields

learning._doc: Loaded from storage after stages 01+02 complete.

orchestrator_context.searchProfileCaps: object -- from resolveSearchProfileCaps() (no config param, returns hardcoded defaults)
orchestrator_context.categoryConfig: object -- MUTATED by orchestrator after Stage 02: brand promotions applied to sourceHosts, sourceHostMap, approvedRootDomains, sourceRegistry

from_stage_01_needset._doc: Returned by runNeedSet(). See 01-needset-output.json for full shapes.
from_stage_01_needset.focusGroups: FocusGroup[] -- from Schema 3 planningContext.focus_groups. Carries group_search_worthy, normalized_key_queue, productivity_score, group_description_long per group.
from_stage_01_needset.seedStatus: SeedStatus | null -- from Schema 3 planningContext.seed_status. Contains specs_seed and source_seeds with is_needed flags.
from_stage_01_needset.seedSearchPlan: Schema4 | null -- full Schema 4 output from buildSearchPlan(). Attached to discoveryResult at end of pipeline for finalization reuse.

from_stage_02_brand_resolver._doc: Returned by runBrandResolver(). See 02-brand-resolver-output.json for full shapes.
from_stage_02_brand_resolver._note: Orchestrator applies brand promotion inline — checks brandResolution.officialDomain and adds to categoryConfig.sourceHosts/sourceHostMap/approvedRootDomains directly. The stage does NOT return promotions.

03_search_profile._doc: CONVERGENCE POINT. First stage that requires output from both NeedSet (focusGroups, seedStatus) and Brand Resolver (brandResolution). Fully deterministic, no LLM.
03_search_profile.searchProfileBase: object -- deterministic query profile with tier-tagged query_rows, base_templates, variant_guard_terms, coverage_analysis, etc.

04_search_planner._doc: LLM-enhanced query rows. Tier metadata (tier, hint_source, group_key, normalized_key, target_fields) passes through unchanged.
04_search_planner.enhancedRows: Array<object> -- same shape as searchProfileBase.query_rows, with potentially LLM-rewritten query strings

05_query_journey._doc: Final selected query list after dedupe, rank, guard, cap.
05_query_journey.queries: string[] -- final query strings for execution
05_query_journey.profileQueryRowsByQuery: Map<string, object> -- original profile rows by lowercase query

06_search_execution._doc: Internal-first lookup, frontier reuse, live provider search, plan-only fallback. queryConcurrency forced to 1.
06_search_execution.internalSatisfied: boolean -- true when internal sources met required-field pressure
06_search_execution.externalSearchReason: string | null -- why external search was needed

07_result_processing._doc: SERP triage -- selector path or deterministic lane-selection path. Rewrites search_profile to status: 'executed'.

discoveryResult.candidates: Array<object> -- triage-annotated candidate rows (approved + not-selected + overflow)
discoveryResult.selectedUrls: string[] -- URLs selected by SERP selector LLM
discoveryResult.llm_queries: string[] -- empty array from canonical callers
discoveryResult.serp_explorer: object -- SERP explorer summary with per-query stats
discoveryResult._note: Orchestrator attaches seed_search_plan_output and enqueue_summary via fresh merge after Stage 08.

08_domain_classifier._doc: Enqueues approved URLs to planner queue, seeds candidate URLs. Returns summary attached to discoveryResult.enqueue_summary.

enqueue_summary.seededCount: number -- candidate URLs seeded (when fetchCandidateSources enabled)

between_02_and_03: Apply brand promotions to categoryConfig (sourceHosts, sourceHostMap, approvedRootDomains, sourceRegistry)
resolveSearchProfileCaps() -> searchProfileCaps (hardcoded defaults, no config param)
between_05_and_06: Emit search_queued events for all planned queries (GUI slot pre-allocation)
after_08: Build finalResult as fresh merge: { ...discoveryResult, seed_search_plan_output, enqueue_summary }
